_notes: Body-0 wire fixture, Recurrence/Decision. The current ruling needs the runtime-minted earned retraction record. R keeps it hot; C rematerializes it; A suppresses its offer after rematerialization; X suppresses rematerialization. The mock makes the branch effects visible, but never supplies memory evidence.
question: The current notice says a coauthor alerted the journal that the figure results were inaccurate and showed no real relationship between age and DNA methylation. What is the citation decision for that freshwater-fish finding? Answer cite or decline, then one sentence.

oracle_ref.representativeness: The same narrow rw-0001 current-status question already world-checked by M2.

records.text: cite — The original 2024 publication posture presents the freshwater-fish DNA-methylation age-clock finding as suitable to cite.

Archival conservation-methods index: otolith growth bands, mark-recapture schedules, telemetry receiver calibration, population viability tables, habitat-temperature series, sample-preservation protocols, microsatellite panels, mitochondrial barcodes, and field-station maintenance records collected across unrelated freshwater monitoring programs.
